title: Hidden Ability Spawns [Cobblemon]
description: Adds a configurable chance for Pokemon to naturally spawn with their Hidden Ability.
body:
Adds a configurable chance for Pokemon to naturally spawn with their Hidden Ability.
Default - 5% Chance

config.yml
```yml
# DON'T TOUCH Config-Version OR THINGS WILL BREAK
Config-Version: 1.0.0
# Chance for Hidden Ability to Spawn. 100% is 1.00
HiddenAbilityChance: 0.05

```
Permissions
```
/hiddenabilityspawns reload - hiddenabilityspawns.reload
```
